mission.title: flux: bootstrap: More details for `flux-system context deadline exceeded`
mission.description: bootstrap: More details for `flux-system context deadline exceeded` . This issue affects 7+ users.

steps.title: Identify flux feature symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your flux deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=flux
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `context deadline exceeded`

steps.title: Check current Pod configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant flux resources:
```bash
kubectl get pod -A
kubectl describe pod <name> -n <namespace>
```
### Describe the bug

Good day colleagues!

Please check the log below:

```
flux bootstrap gitlab --owner=gecube --repository=****** --path=mail-cluster --components-extra="image-reflector-controller

steps.title: Apply the fix for bootstrap: More details for `flux-system context deadline ex
steps.description:
This PR updates the bootstrap health checks to include GitRepository resource, return the  Ready condition message on timeout, and log the error at the end for better visibility.
Fixes: https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2/issues/4411

Before (showing only relevant output:
```
✔ reconciled sync configura
```yaml
flux bootstrap gitlab --owner=gecube --repository=****** --path=mail-cluster --components-extra="image-reflector-controller,image-automation-controller"

► cloning branch "main" from Git repository "https://gitlab.com/gecube/******.git"

► pushing component manifests to "https://gitlab.com/gecube/******.git"
► installing components in "flux-system" namespace
✔ installed components
✔ rec

steps.title: Confirm bootstrap: More details for `flux-system context d is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `context deadline exceeded` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary:
The root cause is: This PR updates the bootstrap health checks to include GitRepository resource, return the  Ready condition message on timeout, and log the error at the end for better visibility.
Fixes: https://github.com/fluxcd/flux2/issues/4411

Before (showing only relevant output:
```
✔ reconciled sync configuration
◎ waiting for Kustomization "flux-system/flux-system" to be reconciled
✗ client rate limiter Wa. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with flux installed or the issue environment reproducible.
